title: Portable Context Control Plane — SelectionDecision
description: Internal object schema for a single SelectionDecision record produced by a selector during fan-out. Canonical owner: docs/06 §4. All 10 required fields defined here. Non-MVP fields (action: quarantine, action: unavailable, unknownId field) are excluded per docs/12 §9.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-3 (Batch C creation). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. All enum values $ref enums.shared.schema.json. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

componentId.description: The validated registry component ID this decision applies to. For action: reference_unknown, this carries the unknown string (no separate unknownId field in MVP — safe-defer 5-Q4). Canonical: docs/06 §4.

selectorName.description: The name of the selector module that produced this decision (e.g., 'ScaffoldSelector', 'ToolSelector'). Canonical: docs/06 §4.

action.description: The selector's decision for this component: include, omit, defer, or reference_unknown. action: quarantine and action: unavailable are not valid MVP values (F-17 resolved; 5-Q7/F-28 safe-defer). Canonical: docs/06 §4.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the decision. Must not contain raw component content, raw history turn content, or raw user message text. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

path.description: The decision ladder path that produced this action. Must be consistent with the action value (e.g., safe_to_omit_match only valid with action: omit; safety_override only valid with action: include). Canonical: docs/06 §4 and docs/12 §6.1.

confidence.description: Selector confidence in this decision: high, medium, or low. No float confidence on SelectionDecision (F-08 resolved). A low-confidence omit is invalid in MVP — the selector must fall to fail_open. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

evidence.description: Signal atoms and trace atoms that justify this decision. Must be non-empty for any action: omit decision — empty evidence[] with omit is a harness failure. Evidence items are coded atoms (e.g., 'promptFamily=simple_greeting', 'requiredWhen=coding_build_debug') and must not contain raw component content, raw history turn content, or raw user message text. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

constraintsApplied.description: Descriptions of the specific constraint fields that governed this decision (e.g., 'retainPolicy=mandatory', 'userConstraints.alwaysInclude'). Used for Step 3 hard-protection decisions and Step 6 user-constraint decisions. Empty array when no constraints applied. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

warnings.description: Per-decision warning codes emitted for this decision (e.g., injection_suspect_omit_allowed, path_a_null_evidence, injection_suspect_policy_override). Not the same as global planningWarnings. Must not contain the global per-run injection warning codes (injection_suspect_warn_and_continue, injection_suspect_fail_open_all) — those are orchestrator-owned globals only. Canonical: docs/06 §4 and §17.6.

traceRefs.description: Array of trace entry IDs (decisionId values) referencing TraceEntry objects in selectorPhase.selectorTrace[]. Provides a bi-directional link from this decision to the corresponding trace events. Canonical: docs/06 §4.

budgetHint.description: Optional informational budget classification for this component. Produced by budget-aware selector hint logic (docs/06 §20) after the ladder decision is finalised. Must not change action or path. Absent when budget hint was not produced. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

budgetReason.description: Coded atom explaining the budgetHint classification (e.g., retain_policy_safety_critical, high_token_estimate, cost_unknown). Must not contain raw component content or free-form strings. Present only when budgetHint is present. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

tokensApproxObserved.description: The tokensApprox value read from registry metadata at hint-production time, or null if absent. Present only when budgetHint was produced. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

budgetPriorityObserved.description: The budgetPriority value read from registry metadata (integer 1–10 per docs/05 §5), or null if absent. Present only when budgetHint was produced. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

budgetCriticalObserved.description: The budgetState.budgetCritical flag value at the time the budget hint was produced. Present only when budgetHint was produced. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.

budgetWarningCodes.description: Per-decision budget warning codes emitted by budget-hint logic (e.g., budget_cost_unknown, over_budget_protected, budget_pressure_seen). Distinct from the general warnings[] array. Present only when budget-hint logic emitted warnings. Canonical: docs/06 §20.4.
